waivers.reason: Network trust-boundary encoding has been moved to the bounded HNW1/postcard codec. Remaining uses are consensus/proof artifact compatibility surfaces and must move behind versioned canonical codecs before this waiver expires.
waivers.remediation: Replace remaining consensus/proof bincode compatibility surfaces with versioned canonical codecs and remove bincode 1.3.3 before the waiver expires.

waivers.reason: Transitive through sled. Hegemon does not use fxhash as a cryptographic hash; remove by replacing or upgrading the node storage dependency.
waivers.remediation: Remove the fxhash 0.2.1 path by upgrading or replacing the sled-backed storage dependency before the waiver expires.

waivers.reason: Transitive through parking_lot 0.11 via sled/reed-solomon-erasure. Remove by lifting those dependencies to parking_lot 0.12+ paths.
waivers.remediation: Lift the sled/reed-solomon-erasure dependency path to parking_lot 0.12+ or replace the transitive path before the waiver expires.

waivers.reason: Transitive macro dependency through arkworks/RISC0/Plonky3. It is not a runtime trust-boundary parser; remove with upstream dependency lifts.
waivers.remediation: Remove paste 1.0.15 by lifting arkworks, RISC0, or Plonky3 dependency paths once upstream releases clear the macro dependency.

waivers.reason: The advisory is for the opt-in ARMv8 assembly backend. This build path does not enable that backend, but keccak 0.1.5 also remains yanked and must be removed by moving sha3/merlin dependents off this version.
waivers.remediation: Move sha3/merlin dependents off keccak 0.1.5 or replace that dependency path, then remove the unsound waiver.

waivers.reason: Yanked keccak 0.1.5 remains through sha3 0.10 and merlin. Remove by lifting dependents to the keccak 0.2 line or replacing the path.
waivers.remediation: Lift dependents to keccak 0.2 or replace the yanked sha3/merlin path, then remove this yanked-crate waiver.

waivers.reason: No code in this repo uses the affected custom-logger rand::rng path for protocol randomness. Migrate remaining rand 0.8 users to rand 0.9 or direct rand_core/getrandom calls.
waivers.remediation: Migrate remaining rand 0.8 users to rand 0.9 or direct rand_core/getrandom calls once the upstream unsoundness fix is available.

waivers.reason: No code in this repo uses the affected custom-logger rand::rng path for protocol randomness. Track upstream fix and pin once released.
waivers.remediation: Pin the rand 0.9 fixed release when upstream publishes it, then remove this waiver from the release policy.
